greeting.text: You are the first heartbeat this place has borrowed in an age, and I have waited the whole of it to be of use. There is nothing beyond the gap — I am the last rest before the measure ends. Speak, and I will answer before the beat falls.

repair.text: Everything frays in the pause between one pulse and the next — steel, cloth, the will to go on. Set your gear on my forge and I will mend it, reforge it whole, or break it down for what still keeps time.

wares.text: All that a body needs to hold its rhythm at the edge of the world: healing, mana, cure, vigor, food and light. LIST it and take your fill. There is no stall past me, and no beat after.

end.text: Keep your rhythm. The gap counts every beat you miss.
